finding: A task card can list `atomic_workbench/atomization-coverage/path-to-atom-map.json` as a deliverable while the validator treats owner shards as the source of truth; editing only the projection makes `validate:atomization-coverage` fail with a shard-merge mismatch.
expectedBehavior: Task cards that require atom-map updates should name the owner shard path or provide a governed projection rebuild lane; `next`/import should warn when only the generated projection is scoped.
evidenceOrRepro: During TASK-AAO-0158, updating only `path-to-atom-map.json` produced `projection mappings=165, merged shards=161` and remediation `path-to-atom-map-shards/merge.js <repo> write-projection`; the change was reverted because the claimed scope did not include shard files.
followUp: Add task-card authoring validation for generated atom-map projections versus owner-shard source files, and provide a safe scope amendment or rebuild command.
